data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. SPRING DAZZLER scored two back in the quickest time on the program then drifted back and missed the frame latest finishing a 6 length 4th at this track (23.35). Smart beginner who should take advantage of the low draw. Rates on top in this line up. 1. MIA'S IMPACT looks close to another win after hitting the frame in a 4.5 lengths third (23.17) in a Grade 5 at this track. Some good form is emerging from her last run. Expected to feature. 2. TINY SNIFFY scored two back when on speed but last start drifted back and could manage only a 10 length 6th at this track (23.50). Comes through a solid form race last start. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 7. FUGENZO can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.","runners":[3,1,2,7],"exclusive":false}
